name: Fairway Custom Golf of Terre Haute
about: Fairway Custom Golf of Terre Haute is a premier golf shop and fitting center with 22+ years of experience serving the Wabash Valley. The facility offers a comprehensive golf experience with club sales, repairs, and on-site SkyTrak Launch Monitors for testing new equipment. Customers can try clubs before purchasing and access a simulator with play options. The shop carries major brands like Callaway, TaylorMade, Mizuno, and Cobra, with a focus on personalized fitting services and expert advice from co-owners Dick Hatcher and Brad Langdon. The venue combines retail elements with simulation technology for a hands-on golf shopping and practice experience.
why_golfers_like_it: Try-before-you-buy club testing on SkyTrak Launch Monitors
Expert club fitting and repair services on-site
Access to golf simulator with course play options
Wide selection of new and used major brand equipment

simulator_hardware.notes: Used for club testing and simulator play

faq.question: Do I need to bring my own clubs?
faq.answer: No, you can try any of their clubs on the SkyTrak Launch Monitor before purchasing.

faq.question: Can I bring my own food and drinks?
faq.answer: The venue does not mention food or drink service, so BYOB may be allowed but isn't specified.

faq.question: How long does it take to play 18 holes?
faq.answer: The website doesn't specify exact timing for 18 holes, but simulator time is available for $25/hour.

faq.question: Is this venue kid-friendly?
faq.answer: Yes, the venue appears family-friendly with accessible equipment and practice options for golfers of all skill levels.
